reasoning: The sprite has correct accent colors — saturated green leaf/sprout and small orange warm touches align well with the Echoes palette. However the dominant body mass is a cold neutral steel-grey, which directly violates the 'shadows are colored darks (deep teal/plum/warm brown), NEVER pure black/grey' rule. Grey occupies roughly 50-60% of the sprite's pixel area, pulling the overall mood toward cool/industrial. White face panel is neutral but tolerable. The green and orange accents are on-palette and would pass individually, but they are too minor to rescue the overall harmony from the grey dominance. To pass, the body grey should be shifted to a warm brown, deep teal, or plum-tinted dark so colored darks anchor the form instead of desaturated grey.
